markdown:
#  How can I email a submittal so people can reply through email? 
##  Answer 
If you want to email a submittal to other Procore users, you can open a submittal in view mode and click the **Email** button. This initiates a new communication thread for the submittal item. When you click the Email button, the system lets you designate your desired recipients. In addition, the system captures all email exchanges in a communication thread in the Email tab of the submittal. For details, see [Forward a Submittal by Email](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/forward-a-submittal-by-email).
## See Also

title: How can I email a submittal so people can reply through email?
